title: tripleurospermum maritimum
intro: Tripleurospermum maritimum, also known as sea hawthorn or sea mayweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to the coastal regions of Europe and Asia and is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Tripleurospermum maritimum have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
